title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM SV (Subject Visits) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM SV (Subject Visits) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw subject visits data, (2) Derive USUBJID and SVSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: VISITNUM, VISIT, SVSTDTC, SVENDTC, SVDY, (4) Handle visit derivation from subject elements, visit date handling, study day calculation, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 3640 records.
